features.name: ternary operator with constant true condition selecting between arithmetic and logical right shift
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator with constant condition 1 that selects between $signed(a)>>>1 (arithmetic right shift) and a>>1 (logical right shift)

features.name: $signed() cast with arithmetic right shift >>> operator
features.description: Code should include $signed() cast applied to a variable followed by arithmetic right shift >>>

features.name: comparison between ternary result and direct shift expression
features.description: Code should include comparing the result of a ternary with a direct $signed()>>>1 expression to expose miscompilation
